itinerary.title: Singapore Sentosa Fun
itinerary.overview:
Sentosa Island • Universal Studios • Adventure Cove • Family Resort Stay 04 Nights / 05 Days Ultimate Sentosa Family Fun Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-011 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-FUN-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Best Sentosa Family Fun Tour Package DURATION: 04 Nights / 05 Days Sentosa Island & Singapore City

TOUR OVERVIEW
Get ready for non-stop action and thrills with our TRAGUIN curated Sentosa Fun Package. This Singapore- Sentosa family holiday is jam-packed with world-class theme parks, water adventures, and resort relaxation, guaranteeing unforgettable memories in Southeast Asia’s premier entertainment hub. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore package (SG-011 / TRG-SIN-FUN-2026): Sentosa Island • Universal Studios • Adventure Cove • Family Resort Stay with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL & SENTOSA CHECK-IN
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your ultra-luxury Sentosa resort. Spend the evening enjoying the island’s serene beach and amenities.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UNIVERSAL STUDIOS ADVENTURE
days.description: A full day of thrills at Universal Studios Singapore. Enjoy priority access to top movie-themed rides—a perfect family experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ADVENTURE COVE & WATER FUN
days.description: Experience the excitement of Adventure Cove Waterpark. Perfect for family aquatic fun, ensuring you collect unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SENTOSA ISLAND DISCOVERY
days.description: Explore Sentosa’s various attractions, from luge rides to cable car vistas. A day of action-packed entertainment and island leisure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Sentosa family adventure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
